data.title: Dr. Dave Utzke joins JOTO PR Disruptors™ to promote digital trust and ethical technology, impacting the crypto ecosystem.
data.description: JOTO PR Disruptors™ recently announced the signing of Dr. Dave Utzke, an expert in digital trust and security, to further enhance his efforts in revolutionizing the protection of human identity and authenticity on the internet. The partnership was made public in Tampa, Florida on December 11, 2025. This collaboration comes at a critical time as the crypto community deals with issues related to false information and security concerns.

data.title: ANSI board selects new leaders for 2026 with Christian Dubay of NFPA appointed for a second one-year term.
data.description: In a recent announcement made on December 11, 2025, the Board of Directors of the American National Standards Institute (ANSI) shared the selection of new members and officers who will commence their term on January 1, 2026. Christian Dubay from the National Fire Protection Association (NFPA) has been chosen for a second consecutive one-year term on the board. This development indicates a significant update within the ANSI leadership, marking the start of a new governance cycle for the organization.

data.title: Study shows demand for implementation partners with AI expertise for ServiceNow; HFS Research & NewRocket report.
data.description: On December 11, 2025, a recent study conducted by HFS Research in collaboration with NewRocket revealed a surge in demand for implementation partners skilled in updating organizations’ delivery methods to synchronize with ServiceNow's AI-powered features. The report highlights a significant need for expertise in leveraging ServiceNow’s advanced capabilities, indicating a growing market for professionals who can enhance organizational operational efficiency through innovative solutions. The study underscores the importance of adapting to emerging technologies to meet evolving business requirements effectively.

data.title: Sun Auto Tire & Service raises $20K for Tunnel to Towers on Giving Tuesday, providing homes for injured veterans.
data.description: In Mesa, Arizona on December 11, 2025, Sun Auto Tire & Service has shared the success of its collaboration with the Tunnel to Towers Foundation on Giving Tuesday. The foundation is dedicated to recognizing America's heroes by offering mortgage-free homes to severely injured veterans.

data.title: Food Recovery Network and Gaylord National recover almost 100,000 pounds of surplus food, a milestone achieved in 2 years.
data.description: In an exciting development, Food Recovery Network (FRN) has reached a significant achievement by nearly recovering 100,000 pounds of excess food in collaboration with Gaylord National Resort and Convention Center. Over a span of slightly more than 2 years, this partnership has been instrumental in rescuing...

data.title: Stock market sees mixed results: Dow rises, Nasdaq and S&P 500 fall. Oracle stock dives on earnings report.
data.description: Today, the stock market saw the Dow Jones index climbing, in contrast to the Nasdaq and S&P 500 which experienced declines. Notably, artificial intelligence stock Oracle took a nosedive following its earnings report. This live coverage highlighted the breakouts of shares belonging to Boot Barn, ATI, and Penumbra amidst the market movements. It was a day of mixed performances on Wall Street, with the Dow Jones showing gains while the Nasdaq and S&P 500 faced losses, and particular attention was drawn to Oracle's significant drop in the wake of its earnings announcement. Shares of Boot Barn, ATI, and Penumbra were identified as standouts in today's trading session.

data.title: Senate expected to vote on Michael Selig as CFTC chair today. If confirmed, Caroline Pham to step down. #news #CFTC
data.description: Senators are anticipated to vote on the nomination of Michael Selig as the head of the CFTC. If confirmed, this move could result in the current acting Chair, Caroline Pham, stepping down from her position.

data.title: Broadcom (AVGO) stock is down ahead of earnings release. Analysts predict $1.86 EPS and $17.49B revenue. Investors cautious.
data.description: Broadcom Inc (NASDAQ: AVGO) shares are declining ahead of its fiscal fourth-quarter earnings report. Analysts are predicting earnings of $1.86 per share, an increase from $1.42 per share in the same period last year. Revenue estimates suggest $17.49 billion for the quarter, compared to $14.05 billion a year ago. Broadcom has a strong track record of surpassing revenue expectations in three of the last four quarters and beating earnings per share estimates in 9 of the last 10 quarters. Investors are approaching the report cautiously, particularly monitoring the company's AI revenue growth and guidance for fiscal 2026.

data.title: Isabel Ramirez Lucas receives 2025 Dr. Emma Lerew Scholarship from For A Bright Future Foundation in Miami.
data.description: On December 11, 2025, in Miami, the Foundation For A Bright Future (FABF), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization led by Louis Hernandez Jr., recognized an exceptional first-generation scholar dedicated to revolutionizing education. This foundation focuses on supporting individuals committed to improving the education sector.

data.title: Digital Silk published an article on common UX mistakes with insights on user experience issues on websites.
data.description: In Miami on December 11, 2025, Digital Silk, a renowned digital agency specializing in brand strategies, custom websites, and digital marketing campaigns, released a new article delving into common user experience problems impacting websites. The agency aims to address issues that compromise user interaction and satisfaction online.
